wafv2.webacl.customhttpheader.Name.Docs: The name of the custom header.   For custom request header insertion, when AWS WAF inserts the header into the request, it prefixes this name `x-amzn-waf-`, to avoid confusion with the headers that are already in the request. For example, for the header name `sample`, AWS WAF inserts the header `x-amzn-waf-sample`.

wafv2.webacl.customhttpheader.Value.Docs: The value of the custom header.
